calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Pursuant To Ccp 473(B)
Off Calendar May-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF YEVGEN TIZENBERG's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Pursuant To Ccp 473(B) is GRANTED. The mandatory relief of CCP 473(b) does not require explanation of an attorney's "mistake, inadvertence, surprise or excusable neglect." (Martin Potts & Assoc., Inc. v. Corsair LLC (2016) 244 Cal.App.4th 432, 440.) It is the application for relief that must be made within six months. (CCP 473(b).) Defendant may file a motion for "reasonable compensatory legal fees and costs." (Id.) Order signed in open court. Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/ru

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2017 Off Calendar

Defendants Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-06-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CHAIRMAN SF, LLC's Motion For Terminating Sanctions is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The Plaintiff has engaged in multiple violations of CCP section 2030.010(d) & (g). Accordingly, terminating sanctions are appropriate.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah D. Lebowitz; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2017 Continued To Dec-05-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to December 5, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Full And Complete Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel L. McCrary, of Raffalow, Rhoads & Bretoi, Tel. 877.707.7992, for defendants Chairman SF, LLC, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. DEFENDANT CHAIRMAN SF, LLC Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Provide Full And Complete Responses To Discovery is granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall, within 15 days, serve code compliant responses to Special Interrogatories, Set One; Demand for Inspection and Production of Documents, Set One; and Form Interrogatories, Set One. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas Cohen; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
